name: Marcos's Calculator
description: Shop math for threads, bolt circles, speeds & feeds, and setup work.

shortcuts.name: Speeds & Feeds
shortcuts.description: Compute SFM, RPM, and feed rate for a material and tool.

shortcuts.name: Bolt Circle
shortcuts.description: Lay out evenly spaced holes on a bolt circle with optional G-code.

shortcuts.name: Thread
shortcuts.description: Tap-drill size and basic thread geometry for UN and metric threads.

shortcuts.name: Right Triangle
shortcuts.description: Solve a right triangle from any two knowns.
